## Type of change

## Checklist

- [ ] `composer test` passes
- [ ] `vendor/bin/phpstan analyse` passes
- [ ] `vendor/bin/pint --test` passes
- [ ] `vendor/bin/phpcs` passes
- [ ] Tests added/updated for the change
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (for user-facing changes)
